extortion.description: FDC / Interiors specializes in creating exceptional and luxurious spaces that reflect innovation and beauty. They focus on unique designs from conception to completion, utilizing the finest materials and precision craftsmanship. The company aims to inspire and engage people while enhancing the legacy of prestigious brands. Their services are intended for clients looking for high-quality, timeless environments.company is headquartered in FDC Interiors headquarters: National Industries Park, Dubai, United Arab Emirates, P.O. Box 113507.201-500 Employees
